headline: Oasis Documentary Promises Rock Reunion Bombshell at Disney
lede: Disney is set to unleash a musical documentary that could rewrite Britpop history, with the first joint Gallagher brothers interview in a quarter-century.
body:
## Breaking Musical Ground

Steven Knight's highly anticipated Oasis documentary promises to deliver a seismic moment for rock fans worldwide. The film, slated for a limited theatrical release on September 11, will feature the first collaborative interview with Noel and Liam Gallagher since their notorious band implosion in 2009.

### Theatrical and Streaming Strategy

Disney is positioning the documentary as a major music event, with an initial IMAX and theatrical run followed by a streaming debut on Disney+ later this year. Knight, known for his narrative storytelling in projects like 'Peaky Blinders', brings his signature documentary style to this explosive music chronicle.

### Industry Implications

The documentary represents more than a nostalgic music moment. It signals a potential reconciliation between two of Britain's most volatile rock siblings and offers unprecedented insight into one of modern music's most tumultuous brotherhoods.

Fans and critics alike will be watching closely to see how Knight navigates the complex dynamics between Noel and Liam Gallagher, whose public feuds have become legendary in rock circles.
key_facts: First Gallagher brothers joint interview in 25 years
Disney+ streaming scheduled for later in 2026
